old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-2fn5","title":"Validate public CoAP BlockOption fields","description":"BlockOption fields are public, so callers can construct invalid szx/num values that receive_block passes to size/offset before validation, causing oversized shifts or overflow and target-dependent panic/wrap. Validate before arithmetic or make construction invariant-enforcing.
